Implements a confirmation dialog with action bar and icon management for Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
The code defines a `ConfirmationDialog` structure and provides functions to create, manage, and display a confirmation dialog in a user interface. The `ConfirmationDialog` structure includes an `ActionableDialog`, an `ActionBarLayer`, and two `GBitmap` objects for confirm and decline icons. The [`confirmation_dialog_create`](<#confirmation_dialog_create>) function initializes a new `ConfirmationDialog` instance, setting up the action bar with icons and configuring it as a custom type of `ActionableDialog`. This function handles memory allocation and ensures that resources are properly initialized or deallocated in case of failure.

The code also provides several functions to interact with the `ConfirmationDialog`. The [`confirmation_dialog_get_dialog`](<#confirmation_dialog_get_dialog>) and [`confirmation_dialog_get_action_bar`](<#confirmation_dialog_get_action_bar>) functions return pointers to the dialog and action bar components, respectively. The [`confirmation_dialog_set_click_config_provider`](<#confirmation_dialog_set_click_config_provider>) function allows the configuration of click event handling for the action bar. The [`confirmation_dialog_push`](<#confirmation_dialog_push>) and [`app_confirmation_dialog_push`](<#app_confirmation_dialog_push>) functions are used to display the dialog on the window stack, while [`confirmation_dialog_pop`](<#confirmation_dialog_pop>) removes the dialog and deallocates associated resources. This code is intended to be part of a larger application, providing a reusable component for confirmation dialogs with a consistent interface and behavior.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `confirmation_dialog.h`
- `applib/graphics/gtypes.h`
- `applib/ui/action_bar_layer.h`
- `applib/ui/dialogs/actionable_dialog.h`
- `applib/ui/dialogs/dialog_private.h`
- `applib/ui/window_stack.h`
- `kernel/pbl_malloc.h`
- `resource/resource_ids.auto.h`
- `system/passert.h`


# Data Structures

---
### ConfirmationDialog
- **Type**: ``struct``
- **Members**:
    - `action_dialog`: An `ActionableDialog` that provides the base dialog functionality.
    - `action_bar`: An `ActionBarLayer` that manages the action bar interface.
    - `confirm_icon`: A `GBitmap` that holds the icon for the confirm action.
    - `decline_icon`: A `GBitmap` that holds the icon for the decline action.
- **Description**: Represents a dialog structure that includes an action dialog and an action bar with confirm and decline icons. It is used to create a dialog with customizable actions and icons, allowing users to confirm or decline actions within an application interface.


# Functions

---
### confirmation\_dialog\_create<!-- {{#callable:confirmation_dialog_create}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/dialogs/confirmation_dialog.c#L35>)

Creates and initializes a `ConfirmationDialog` with custom action bar icons and settings.
- **Inputs**:
    - `dialog_name`: A string representing the name of the dialog to initialize.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Allocate memory for a `ConfirmationDialog` structure using `task_zalloc_check`.
    - Initialize the `confirm_icon` with a resource ID for the check icon; if it fails, free the allocated memory and return `NULL`.
    - Initialize the `decline_icon` with a resource ID for the X icon; if it fails, deinitialize the `confirm_icon`, free the allocated memory, and return `NULL`.
    - Initialize the `action_bar` and set its icons for the up and down buttons using the initialized bitmaps.
    - Set the background color of the `action_bar` to black and associate the `ConfirmationDialog` with the `action_bar` context.
    - Initialize the `action_dialog` with the provided `dialog_name` and set its action bar type to custom using the `action_bar`.
    - Return the pointer to the initialized `ConfirmationDialog`.
- **Output**: A pointer to the newly created `ConfirmationDialog`, or `NULL` if initialization fails.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`gbitmap_init_with_resource`](<../../graphics/gbitmap.c.md#gbitmap_init_with_resource>)
    - [`gbitmap_deinit`](<../../graphics/gbitmap.c.md#gbitmap_deinit>)
    - [`action_bar_layer_init`](<../action_bar_layer.c.md#action_bar_layer_init>)
    - [`action_bar_layer_set_icon`](<../action_bar_layer.c.md#action_bar_layer_set_icon>)
    - [`action_bar_layer_set_background_color`](<../action_bar_layer.c.md#action_bar_layer_set_background_color>)
    - [`action_bar_layer_set_context`](<../action_bar_layer.c.md#action_bar_layer_set_context>)
    - [`actionable_dialog_init`](<actionable_dialog.c.md#actionable_dialog_init>)
    - [`actionable_dialog_set_action_bar_type`](<actionable_dialog.c.md#actionable_dialog_set_action_bar_type>)

### confirmation\_dialog\_get\_dialog<!-- {{#callable:confirmation_dialog_get_dialog}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/dialogs/confirmation_dialog.c#L69>)

Retrieves the `Dialog` object from a `ConfirmationDialog` structure.
- **Inputs**:
    - `confirmation_dialog`: A pointer to a `ConfirmationDialog` structure from which to retrieve the `Dialog` object.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if `confirmation_dialog` is `NULL`.
    - If `confirmation_dialog` is `NULL`, return `NULL`.
    - If `confirmation_dialog` is not `NULL`, call [`actionable_dialog_get_dialog`](<actionable_dialog.c.md#actionable_dialog_get_dialog>) with the `action_dialog` member of `confirmation_dialog` and return its result.
- **Output**: A pointer to a `Dialog` object if `confirmation_dialog` is not `NULL`; otherwise, `NULL`.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`actionable_dialog_get_dialog`](<actionable_dialog.c.md#actionable_dialog_get_dialog>)


---
### confirmation\_dialog\_get\_action\_bar<!-- {{#callable:confirmation_dialog_get_action_bar}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/dialogs/confirmation_dialog.c#L76>)

Retrieves the `ActionBarLayer` from a `ConfirmationDialog` object.
- **Inputs**:
    - `confirmation_dialog`: A pointer to a `ConfirmationDialog` object from which to retrieve the `ActionBarLayer`.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if `confirmation_dialog` is `NULL`.
    - If `confirmation_dialog` is `NULL`, return `NULL`.
    - If `confirmation_dialog` is not `NULL`, return the address of its `action_bar` member.
- **Output**: A pointer to the `ActionBarLayer` of the given `ConfirmationDialog`, or `NULL` if the input is `NULL`.


---
### confirmation\_dialog\_set\_click\_config\_provider<!-- {{#callable:confirmation_dialog_set_click_config_provider}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/dialogs/confirmation_dialog.c#L83>)

Sets the click configuration provider for the action bar of a confirmation dialog.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``confirmation_dialog``: A pointer to a `ConfirmationDialog` structure, which must not be `NULL`.
    - ``click_config_provider``: A `ClickConfigProvider` function that defines the click configuration for the action bar.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if `confirmation_dialog` is `NULL`; if it is, return immediately.
    - Get the `action_bar` from the `confirmation_dialog`.
    - Call [`action_bar_layer_set_click_config_provider`](<../action_bar_layer.c.md#action_bar_layer_set_click_config_provider>) with the `action_bar` and `click_config_provider` to set the click configuration.
- **Output**: No output is returned.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`action_bar_layer_set_click_config_provider`](<../action_bar_layer.c.md#action_bar_layer_set_click_config_provider>)


---
### confirmation\_dialog\_push<!-- {{#callable:confirmation_dialog_push}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/dialogs/confirmation_dialog.c#L92>)

Pushes a `ConfirmationDialog` onto a `WindowStack` by utilizing its underlying `ActionableDialog`.
- **Inputs**:
    - `confirmation_dialog`: A pointer to a `ConfirmationDialog` structure that contains the dialog to be pushed.
    - `window_stack`: A pointer to a `WindowStack` where the dialog will be pushed.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Calls the [`actionable_dialog_push`](<actionable_dialog.c.md#actionable_dialog_push>) function with the `action_dialog` member of the `confirmation_dialog` and the `window_stack` as arguments.
- **Output**: No return value.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`actionable_dialog_push`](<actionable_dialog.c.md#actionable_dialog_push>)

[View Source →](<../../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/dialogs/confirmation_dialog.c#L96>)

Pushes a `ConfirmationDialog` onto the application window stack.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``confirmation_dialog``: A pointer to a `ConfirmationDialog` structure that contains the dialog to be pushed.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Calls the function [`app_actionable_dialog_push`](<actionable_dialog.c.md#app_actionable_dialog_push>) with the `action_dialog` member of the `confirmation_dialog` structure.
- **Output**: No return value.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`app_actionable_dialog_push`](<actionable_dialog.c.md#app_actionable_dialog_push>)

### confirmation\_dialog\_pop<!-- {{#callable:confirmation_dialog_pop}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../src/fw/applib/ui/dialogs/confirmation_dialog.c#L100>)

Removes and deinitializes a `ConfirmationDialog` and its components from the display.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``confirmation_dialog``: A pointer to a `ConfirmationDialog` structure to be removed and deinitialized.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if `confirmation_dialog` is `NULL`; if true, return immediately.
    - Remove the `action_bar` from the window using [`action_bar_layer_remove_from_window`](<../action_bar_layer.c.md#action_bar_layer_remove_from_window>).
    - Deinitialize the `action_bar` using [`action_bar_layer_deinit`](<../action_bar_layer.c.md#action_bar_layer_deinit>).
    - Deinitialize the `confirm_icon` and `decline_icon` using [`gbitmap_deinit`](<../../graphics/gbitmap.c.md#gbitmap_deinit>).
    - Pop the `action_dialog` from the display using [`actionable_dialog_pop`](<actionable_dialog.c.md#actionable_dialog_pop>).
- **Output**: No output is returned.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`action_bar_layer_remove_from_window`](<../action_bar_layer.c.md#action_bar_layer_remove_from_window>)
    - [`action_bar_layer_deinit`](<../action_bar_layer.c.md#action_bar_layer_deinit>)
    - [`gbitmap_deinit`](<../../graphics/gbitmap.c.md#gbitmap_deinit>)
    - [`actionable_dialog_pop`](<actionable_dialog.c.md#actionable_dialog_pop>)
